title: polemonium haydenii f. orbiculare
intro: Polemonium haydenii f. orbiculare, also known as Jacob's ladder, is a flowering plant in the borage family. Traditionally, Jacob's ladder has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as respiratory problems, wounds, and skin conditions, due to its antibacterial and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of Jacob's ladder can be found in the form of infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to soothe and heal the skin, as well as to relieve respiratory issues.
